title: rosa mollis f. lundquistii
intro: Rosa mollis f. lundquistii, also known as Lundquist's rose or Lundquist's moss rose, is a fragrant and ornamental shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa mollis f. lundquistii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Rosa mollis f. lundquistii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
